org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.view

Class ViewComponentPropertyChangeEvent

  • java.lang.Object
    • java.util.EventObject
      • org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.view.ViewComponentChangeEvent
        • org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.view.ViewComponentPropertyChangeEvent
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Serializable

    public class ViewComponentPropertyChangeEvent
extends ViewComponentChangeEvent
    Event of a change in the view component.

    17.0 2013-10-23 21:03:01
    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND

    Serialized Form

      • getPropertyName
